team_name: InteropSync Karnataka — Two-Way SWS ↔ Department Middleware
summary: Design a bidirectional middleware layer that propagates service requests between Karnataka's Single Window System and legacy department systems using UBID as the common join key.
key_steps: Push engine for propagating SWS changes
Pull engine for receiving department updates
Idempotency, audit log, and immutable records
optimization_claims: Reduced costs compared to retroactively rebuilding source systems
constraints_addressed: Silent drifting apart of SWS and department systems
